one_liner: Open-source CLI tool and Node.js API for rendering Mermaid diagrams locally without authentication

auth_methods.notes: No authentication required. Mermaid CLI is a local rendering tool that runs as a command-line utility or Node.js library without any API authentication.

self_serve_notes: Mermaid CLI is a fully open-source tool available on GitHub and npm. Users can install it globally via npm or use it programmatically without any registration, API keys, or account creation. Simply run 'npm install -g @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli' to get started.

api_surface.notes: Provides a Node.js API via the 'run' function from '@mermaid-js/mermaid-cli' package and a CLI tool (mmdc). The API is focused specifically on rendering Mermaid diagrams to SVG, PNG, or PDF formats. No REST or GraphQL API exists for the CLI itself, though third-party services like Beauty Diagram offer HTTP APIs for Mermaid rendering.

evidence.supports: Official GitHub repository for mermaid-cli with 4.8k stars, confirming it's an open-source tool for rendering Mermaid diagrams
Installation via npm without authentication, usage via CLI (mmdc command) or Node.js API
Package available on npm as '@mermaid-js/mermaid-cli', demonstrates self-serve free installation
Node.js programmatic API usage with 'run' function for rendering diagrams locally
Mermaid.js library is open-source and free to use without API or subscription
Multiple MCP server implementations exist for Mermaid CLI, functioning as interfaces between AI assistants and the CLI tool
